code:
struct Player {
    pos           // current physical translation (Vec2)
    prev          // previous physical translation (for interpolation)
    vel           // Vec2
    half          // half-extents (Vec2)
    aim           // Vec2 unit vector
    speed_mult    // 1.0 normal, run_multiplier, sneak_multiplier
    hp            // hit points — attacks subtract, respawn on 0
    iframes       // invulnerability timer (seconds) after being hit
    stamina       // 0.0–1.0, drains while sprinting, recharges otherwise
    noise         // 0.0–1.0, current noise level (affects enemy detection)
}

struct Player {
    pos           // current physical translation (Vec2)
    prev          // previous physical translation (for interpolation)
    vel           // Vec2
    half          // half-extents (Vec2)
    aim           // Vec2 unit vector
    speed_mult    // 1.0 normal, run_multiplier, sneak_multiplier

    iframes       // invulnerability timer (seconds) after being hit
    stamina       // current stamina (0.0 exhausted, 1.0 full)
    max_stamina   // maximum stamina (normalized, 1.0)
    noise         // current noise emission level (0.0 silent, 1.0 loud)
}
